Design.label: Color Palette Deviation
Design.text: The selected colors do not align with our established brand guidelines. Please adjust the hex codes to match the official palette.

Design.label: Inconsistent Spacing
Design.text: The padding and margins around this element are irregular. Please ensure spacing is uniform and follows the design system.

Layout.label: Misaligned Element
Layout.text: This element is not properly anchored to the grid and appears misaligned. Please snap it to the correct grid lines for visual balance.

Layout.label: Overlapping Content
Layout.text: The text or graphic here is overlapping with adjacent elements, hurting readability. Please provide more breathing room.

Editorial.label: Typographical Error
Editorial.text: There appears to be a spelling or typing mistake in this section. Please review the provided copy document and correct the text.

Editorial.label: Grammatical Issue
Editorial.text: The phrasing here contains a grammatical error or awkward sentence structure. Please revise to ensure clear and professional communication.

Brand.label: Incorrect Logo Usage
Brand.text: The logo applied here violates our brand standard usage rules (e.g., wrong aspect ratio, insufficient clear space, or unapproved color). Please replace it with the approved asset.

Brand.label: Off-Brand Tone
Brand.text: The tone of voice in this section diverges from our core brand personality. Please rephrase this to sound more aligned with our brand identity.
